===''Pokémon the Series''=== [[File:Roxie anime.png|thumb|250px|Roxie in {{aniseries|BW}}]] ====''Pokémon the Series: Black & White''==== Roxie appeared in ''[[BW083|Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 1]]'' and ''[[BW084|Part 2]]''. Like the {{pkmn|games}}, she is a musician who plays the bass guitar. She fronts [[Unova]]'s top punk rock band named "Koffing and the Toxics", with {{tc|Roughneck}} {{un|Nicky}} and {{tc|Guitarist}} [[Billy Jo]] as the other members. She is also a powerful [[Gym Leader]], defeating everyone who dared to challenge her with only three Pokémon even when they challenged her with six. When {{Ash}} arrived at her Gym, she was thrilled to see his {{AP|Pikachu}}, as she too had a Pokémon originating from [[Kanto]], {{p|Koffing}}, and happily accepted his challenge. Roxie defeated five out of six of Ash's Pokémon, except for Pikachu, who knocked out Roxie's {{p|Garbodor}}. When she was defeated, she happily congratulated Ash as the crowd cheered for his victory, and she presented him with his eighth and final [[Unova]] Badge, the {{Badge|Toxic}}. She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[BW103|Curtain Up, Unova League!]]''. ====[[Pokémon movie]]s==== Roxie also made a cameo appearance in the ending credits of ''[[M16|Genesect and the Legend Awakened]]''. ====Character==== Roxie is brimming with confidence. She is determined to prove her strength against all challengers, with the [[Virbank Gym]]'s unique rules giving the challenger the opportunity to use up to six Pokémon against Roxie's three. Her usual battle strategy is to {{status|poison}} her opponent's Pokémon before dealing damage with some heavy-hitting attacks. She is highly perceptive and has developed counter strategies to take out her challengers in quick succession. Roxie proved herself to be a very capable [[Gym Leader]], defeating five of {{Ash}}'s six Pokémon despite being at a disadvantage in terms of her [[party]]. She would occasionally perform a riff on her bass during the battle, and the crowd would chant her name. Despite their status as opponents, she also preferred giving Ash a fairer chance, offering {{AP|Pignite}} a [[Pecha Berry]] to heal its poisoning after it defeated {{p|Scolipede}} when she could have simply let the battle continue with Pignite weakening. ====Pokémon==== This listing is of Roxie's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké | trainer = Roxie | pkmn = Koffing | type1 = Poison | epnum = BW083 | epname = Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 1 | img = Roxie Koffing.png | vajp = Kensuke Satō | vaen = Bill Rogers | desc = {{p|Koffing}} was Roxie's lead Pokémon in her Gym battle against Ash. She caught it while she was touring in [[Kanto]], and it became the inspiration for her rock band, "Koffing and the Toxics." Upon Ash, Cilan, and Iris's arrival at the Gym, Koffing was already showcasing its power, effortlessly defeating a Trainer's Gothitelle despite the type disadvantage. During Ash's battle, Koffing proved to be quite strong and tough to handle, easily taking down his {{AP|Boldore}} and {{AP|Unfezant}}. However, its impressive streak ended when {{AP|Leavanny}}, using String Shot to tie Koffing up and then landing an Energy Ball, finally defeating it. Koffing's known moves are {{m|Clear Smog}}, {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Sludge Bomb}}, and {{m|Will-O-Wisp}}. }} {{TrainerPoké | trainer = Roxie | pkmn = Scolipede | type1 = Bug | type2 = Poison | epnum = BW083 | epname = Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 1 | img = Roxie Scolipede.png | vajp = Unshō Ishizuka | vaen = Marc Thompson | desc = {{p|Scolipede}} was the second Pokémon Roxie used against Ash in their Gym battle. It quickly defeated Ash's Leavanny, but was later taken down by {{AP|Pignite}}'s powerful {{m|Fire Pledge}}, who had the type advantage. Scolipede's known moves are {{m|Toxic}}, {{m|Rock Tomb}}, {{m|Sludge Bomb}}, and {{m|Screech}}. }} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Roxie |pkmn=Garbodor |type1=Poison |epnum=BW084 |epname=Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 2 |img=Roxie Garbodor.png |vajp=Chiaki Takahashi |vaen= Erica Schroeder |desc={{p|Garbodor}} was the third and last Pokémon Roxie used against Ash in their Gym battle. It defeated Ash's Pignite and {{AP|Palpitoad}}, but was later defeated by {{AP|Pikachu}} after getting {{status|paralysis|paralyzed}} by his {{a|Static}}. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[BW103|Certain Up, Unova League!]]''. Garbodor's known moves are {{m|Double Slap}}, {{m|Hyper Beam}}, {{m|Gunk Shot}}, and {{m|Venoshock}}.}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{poison color light}}|bordercolor={{poison color}} |ja=喜多村英梨 ''[[Eri Kitamura]]'' |en=[[Alyson Leigh Rosenfeld|Alyson Rosenfeld]] |nl=Tara Hetharia |zh_cmn=詹雅菁 ''Zhān Yǎjīng'' |da=Sara Poulsen |fi=Taru Tikkanen |fr_eu=Alexandra Corréa |pl=Julia Chatys |pt_br=Clarice Espíndola |es_la=Mireya Mendoza |es_eu=Ainhoa Martín ([[BW083]]-[[BW084]])
